'''doravaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:liberal|liberal]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-r-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:liberal|liberal]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| doravaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:doravithi|doravithi]] || [[word:doraviji|doraviji]] || [[word:doravishi|doravishi]] || [[word:doraviki|doraviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:doravuthuthu|doravuthuthu]] || [[word:doravujuju|doravujuju]] || [[word:doravushushu|doravushushu]] || [[word:doravukuku|doravukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:doravuthu|doravuthu]] || [[word:doravuju|doravuju]] || [[word:doravushu|doravushu]] || [[word:doravuku|doravuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:doravufthuf|doravufthuf]] || [[word:doravufjuf|doravufjuf]] || [[word:doravufshuf|doravufshuf]] || [[word:doravufkuf|doravufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:doravethe|doravethe]] || [[word:doraveje|doraveje]] || [[word:doraveshe|doraveshe]] || [[word:doraveke|doraveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:doravothotho|doravothotho]] || [[word:doravojojo|doravojojo]] || [[word:doravoshosho|doravoshosho]] || [[word:doravokoko|doravokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:doravotho|doravotho]] || [[word:doravojo|doravojo]] || [[word:doravosho|doravosho]] || [[word:doravoko|doravoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:doravofthof|doravofthof]] || [[word:doravofjof|doravofjof]] || [[word:doravofshof|doravofshof]] || [[word:doravofkof|doravofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:doravĂŻfthĂŻf|doravĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfjĂŻf|doravĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfshĂŻf|doravĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfkĂŻf|doravĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:doravĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|doravĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|doravĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|doravĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|doravĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:doravĂŻfthĂŻf|doravĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfjĂŻf|doravĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfshĂŻf|doravĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfkĂŻf|doravĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:doravĂŻfthĂŻf|doravĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfjĂŻf|doravĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfshĂŻf|doravĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:doravĂŻfkĂŻf|doravĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:doravĂŠthĂŠ|doravĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:doravĂŠjĂŠ|doravĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:doravĂŠshĂŠ|doravĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:doravĂŠkĂŠ|doravĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:doravathatha|doravathatha]] || [[word:doravajaja|doravajaja]] || [[word:doravashasha|doravashasha]] || [[word:doravakaka|doravakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:doravatha|doravatha]] || [[word:doravaja|doravaja]] || [[word:doravasha|doravasha]] || [[word:doravaka|doravaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:doravafthaf|doravafthaf]] || [[word:doravafjaf|doravafjaf]] || [[word:doravafshaf|doravafshaf]] || [[word:doravafkaf|doravafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:doravasha|doravasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:doravshĂ«sha|doravshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doravrosha|doravrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doravmusha|doravmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:doravyasha|doravyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoravnkshĂ«sha|godoravnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoravnkrosha|godoravnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoravnkmusha|godoravnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoravnkyasha|godoravnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:doraravasha|doraravasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:doraravshĂ«sha|doraravshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:doraravrosha|doraravrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:doraravmusha|doraravmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:doraravyasha|doraravyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godoraravnkshĂ«sha|godoraravnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godoraravnkrosha|godoraravnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godoraravnkmusha|godoraravnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godoraravnkyasha|godoraravnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:derĂŠvasha|derĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:derĂŠvshĂ«sha|derĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:derĂŠvrosha|derĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:derĂŠvmusha|derĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:derĂŠvyasha|derĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goderĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|goderĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goderĂŠvnkrosha|goderĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goderĂŠvnkmusha|goderĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goderĂŠvnkyasha|goderĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dorfavasha|dorfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dorfavshĂ«sha|dorfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dorfavrosha|dorfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dorfavmusha|dorfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dorfavyasha|dorfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godorfavnkshĂ«sha|godorfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godorfavnkrosha|godorfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godorfavnkmusha|godorfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godorfavnkyasha|godorfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
